query:
SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.status, c.incident_description, c.incident_type,
       c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.reported_cause_label,
       c.vehicle_make, c.vehicle_model, c.vehicle_year, c.vehicle_registration,
       c.claimant_name
FROM claims c
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
